title: BN Weapons
description: Adds some beautiful weapons with their own abilities and a unique method of obtaining.
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4c176494e080be81b73e5dd72a346e18b1eff0a8.png)

## Description

The modification adds 5 melee weapons, more to come soon.
Each weapon has its own 3D model and high-resolution texture.
Some weapons have passive skills or active skills, as well as hidden properties.
Some active skills have a cooldown or harm the durability of the item.
All weapons can be enchanted just like regular ones.
For each weapon, a repair recipe has been added for restoration in the inventory, repair in the forge is also possible.
This weapon is difficult to obtain, but worth it! :)

### Compatibility

Compatible with [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)

### Other projects

[BN Blood Particles](https://modrinth.com/mod/bn-blood-particles) - The modification adds a couple of types of blood particles. Now every damage will be accompanied by profuse bleeding!

[![Discord](https://imgur.com/GFPtfoz.png)](https://discord.com/invite/kUrkrgfMzm)
- If you have any ideas to improve the mod or find any bugs please share it in Discord!
- Also, here you can follow all updates in real time and sometimes get access to test versions of mods.
